languages.text: {n}Манипулус зеркально повторяет ваши действия, опустошая свой кубок.{/n} "Регистрирую усиление каталитических процессов в печени и острую реакцию периферического сосудистого русла. Процессы торможения в нервной системе угнетены". {n}Техножрец озадаченно поднимает бровь.{/n} "Возможно, это своего рода премедикация для лучшего усвоения питательных веществ?" {n}Он переводит взгляд на парящий рядом сервочереп.{/n} "Не понимаю, что тебя столь развеселило, Нунциус".

{n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus imita tus acciones y apura su cáliz.{/n} «Detecto un aumento en los procesos catalíticos de mi hígado y una reacción aguda de mi sistema vascular periférico. Las inhibiciones de mi sistema nervioso se han visto suprimidas». {n}El tecnosacerdote enarca una ceja, confundido.{/n} «¿Se trata acaso de algún tipo de medicamento para estimular la absorción de nutrientes?». {n}Su mirada se desvía hacia el servocráneo que flota junto a él.{/n} «No veo qué tiene eso de gracioso, Nuncius».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus imita tus acciones y apura su cáliz.{/n} «Detecto un aumento en los procesos catalíticos de mi hígado y una reacción aguda de mi sistema vascular periférico. Las inhibiciones de mi sistema nervioso se han visto suprimidas». {n}El tecnosacerdote enarca una ceja, confundido.{/n} «¿Se trata acaso de algún tipo de medicamento para estimular la absorción de nutrientes?». {n}Su mirada se desvía hacia el servocráneo que flota junto a él.{/n} «No veo qué tiene eso de gracioso, Nuncius».

languages.text: {n}操纵者效仿你的举动，将杯中的酒一饮而尽。{/n}“我检测到肝脏的催化反应加剧，外周脉管系统反应剧烈。神经系统的抑制过程正遭受压制。”{n}技术神甫困惑地挑起一侧眉毛。{/n}“这难道是某种预先施用的药物，用以强化营养吸收？”{n}他将目光转向了漂浮在一旁的伺服头骨。{/n}“我不明白是什么事让你觉得如此好笑，努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者效仿你的举动，将杯中的酒一饮而尽。{/n}“我检测到肝脏的催化反应加剧，外周脉管系统反应剧烈。神经系统的抑制过程正遭受压制。”{n}技术神甫困惑地挑起一侧眉毛。{/n}“这难道是某种预先施用的药物，用以强化营养吸收？”{n}他将目光转向了漂浮在一旁的伺服头骨。{/n}“我不明白是什么事让你觉得如此好笑，努恩修斯。”

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus vous imite et vide son verre.{/n} « J'enregistre une augmentation des processus catalytiques de mon foie et une réaction aiguë de mon système vasculaire périphérique. Les processus d'inhibition de mon système nerveux sont réduits. » {n}Le technoprêtre hausse un sourcil, perplexe.{/n} « Pourrait-il s'agir d'un genre de prémédication visant à favoriser l'absorption des nutriments ? » {n}Il tourne le regard vers le servocrâne qui flotte près de lui.{/n} « Je ne vois pas ce qui t'amuse autant, Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus vous imite et vide son verre.{/n} « J'enregistre une augmentation des processus catalytiques de mon foie et une réaction aiguë de mon système vasculaire périphérique. Les processus d'inhibition de mon système nerveux sont réduits. » {n}Le technoprêtre hausse un sourcil, perplexe.{/n} « Pourrait-il s'agir d'un genre de prémédication visant à favoriser l'absorption des nutriments ? » {n}Il tourne le regard vers le servocrâne qui flotte près de lui.{/n} « Je ne vois pas ce qui t'amuse autant, Nuncius. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, hareketlerini taklit ederek kadehini dikiyor.{/n} "Karaciğerimde katalitik süreç artışı ve periferik damar sistemimde akut reaksiyon kaydediyorum. Sinir sistemimdeki inhibisyon süreçleri baskılandı." {n}Tekno Rahip, kafası karışmış bir şekilde tek kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu, besin emilimini artırmak için bir tür ön ilaç tedavisi olabilir mi?" {n}Bakışlarını yakınlarda süzülen hizmelete çeviriyor.{/n} "Seni bu kadar eğlendiren şeyin ne olduğunu anlamıyorum Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, hareketlerini taklit ederek kadehini dikiyor.{/n} "Karaciğerimde katalitik süreç artışı ve periferik damar sistemimde akut reaksiyon kaydediyorum. Sinir sistemimdeki inhibisyon süreçleri baskılandı." {n}Tekno Rahip, kafası karışmış bir şekilde tek kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu, besin emilimini artırmak için bir tür ön ilaç tedavisi olabilir mi?" {n}Bakışlarını yakınlarda süzülen hizmelete çeviriyor.{/n} "Seni bu kadar eğlendiren şeyin ne olduğunu anlamıyorum Nuncius."

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスはあなたの動作を真似て、酒杯を飲み干した。{/n}「肝臓における触媒反応の増加と、末梢血管系における急性反応を記録しています。神経系の抑制過程が抑えられています」{n}技術司祭は怪訝そうに片眉を上げた。{/n}「これは栄養吸収を促進するための一種の前投薬なのでしょうか？」{n}彼は近くに浮かぶサーヴォスカルへと視線を移した。{/n}「何がそんなに面白いのか、私には分かりませんよ、ヌンキウス」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスはあなたの動作を真似て、酒杯を飲み干した。{/n}「肝臓における触媒反応の増加と、末梢血管系における急性反応を記録しています。神経系の抑制過程が抑えられています」{n}技術司祭は怪訝そうに片眉を上げた。{/n}「これは栄養吸収を促進するための一種の前投薬なのでしょうか？」{n}彼は近くに浮かぶサーヴォスカルへと視線を移した。{/n}「何がそんなに面白いのか、私には分かりませんよ、ヌンキウス」

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus imitiert dich und leert seinen Kelch.{/n} "Ich registriere erhöhte katalytische Prozesse in meiner Leber und eine akute Reaktion meiner peripheren Vaskulatur. Inhibitionsprozesse meines Nervensystems werden unterdrückt." {n}Der Techpriester hebt verwundert eine Augenbraue.{/n} "Könnte das eine Art Prämedikation für eine verbesserte Nährstoffabsorption sein?" {n}Er betrachtet den in der Nähe schwebenden Servoschädel.{/n} "Ich weiß nicht, was Euch derart amüsiert, Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus mirrors your actions, draining his goblet.{/n} "I am registering increased catalytic processes in my liver and an acute reaction in my peripheral vasculature. Inhibition processes in my nervous system are suppressed." {n}The Tech-Priest raises an eyebrow in confusion.{/n} "Could this be some sort of premedication for enhanced nutrient absorption?" {n}He shifts his gaze to the servo-skull hovering nearby.{/n} "I don't see what's got you so amused, Nuncius."
